scenario.name: OSP_CHFE_006_var2

Global.variables: conference_id, OSP_tel, CHFE_tel, Call_ID_conference_from_BRIDGE, IF_OSP_BCF, IF_BCF_OSP, IF_OSP_CHFE, IF_CHFE_OSP, IF_CHFE_OSP, IF_OSP_BRIDGE, IF_BRIDGE_OSP, IF_OSP_CHFE, IF_CHFE_OSPE

scenario.send:
INVITE urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]>;tag=osp To: <urn:service:sos>;tag=chfe Call-ID: osptoCHFEcallid@[$IF_OSP_BCF] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Geolocation: <cid:location@[$IF_OSP_BCF]> Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=next-content Content-Length: [len]
--next-content Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Content-ID: <location@[$IF_OSP_BCF]>
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" xmlns:gp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10" xmlns:bp="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:basicPolicy" xmlns:ca="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf:geopriv10:civicAddr" xmlns:gs="http://www.opengis.net/pidflo/1.0" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml" entity="sip:location@[$IF_OSP_BCF]"> <tuple id="0"> <status> <gp:geopriv> <gp:location-info> <gml:Point srsName="urn:ogc:def:crs:EPSG::4326"> <gml:pos>40.71668300756087 -73.99069756654683</gml:pos> </gml:Point> </gp:location-info> </gp:geopriv> </status> <timestamp>2050-05-15T12:30:00Z</timestamp> </tuple> </presence>
--next-content Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [$IF_OSP_BCF] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=text 49170 RTP/AVP 98 a=rtpmap:98 t140/1000
--next-content--

ACK urn:service:sos SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]>;tag=osp To: <urn:service:sos>;tag=chfe Call-ID: osptoCHFEcallid@[$IF_OSP_BCF] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_OSP]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_OSP_BRIDGE]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BCF]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_OSP]:[local_port] Call-ID: [$Call_ID_conference_from_BRIDGE] CSeq: 2 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_OSP_BRIDGE]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
